examples: Bolivar had received aid from Haiti and had promised in return to abolish slavery in the areas he liberated.
Among the streets off Parque Simon bolivar, wanderers will find a whitewashed cathedral that claims to be South America's oldest.
At Casa Bolivar, 14 spacious studios and loft apartments have been lovingly renovated into individually styled spaces.
The bolivar hit a new low Wednesday, closing at 1, 716 to the dollar, down 6% from Tuesday.
Venezuela's bolivar currency fell about 9% against the dollar in black-market trading Thursday, to 6.1 per dollar.
